attacking_style: Attempts signature explosive attacks on climbs (e.g., Porte de Bales) but lacks sustained power to maintain gaps. Attacks appear opportunistic but physiologically unsustainable in 2017.
team_tactics: Insufficient data on team setup from observations provided. No clear patterns of domestique-led tempo control documented across these race segments.
terrain_preference: Traditional mountain stages remain his natural terrain, but uphill sprint finishes expose declining explosive power against younger puncheurs. Multi-climb stages show vulnerability on final ascents.
vulnerability: Psychological fragility after mechanicals/crashes compounds physical struggles. Cannot recover power after early-race efforts. Explosive uphill finishes against fresh punchy climbers reveal declining W/kg.
key_patterns: Shows brief attacking sparks on climbs but pays severe time penalty later in stage (2 observations)
Psychological body language deteriorates visibly after setbacks like crashes or mechanicals (2 observations)
Unable to match young explosive riders on punchy uphill finishes, losing 18+ seconds (2 observations)
Resurgence capacity exists: recovered to third place after early Tour struggles despite 5:15 deficit (1 major observation)
form_trajectory: negative: Clear decline pattern with four negative signals showing inability to sustain attacks, vulnerability to punchy riders, and psychological fragility, despite one late-Tour resurgence suggesting fighting spirit remains
